prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科/历史类最低位次约372→1123→642→653→799名，整体呈先降后升再降的波动走势；2025年基准约799名，较2024年653名后移146名；2021–2025年文科/历史类计划数分别为3、6、6、6、6人，2025年为6人；2026年历史类计划3人，较2025年缩招50%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一 流建设高校；软科2026年主榜约第60名，近年排名稳定在43–61区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（院长论文造假 、教师数据伪造等），可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度为较热（总排名第48），短视频曝光量中等偏上；社会学A、世界史A-，均为A-及以上 学科；与招生专业思想政治教育（马克思主义理论类）无直接学科映射，但社会学A级学科对人文社科类报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 思想政治教育属师范/教育大 类，2024年专业热度为分化观望，社会热度中性偏稳；本省2026年考生总数约48000人，较2025年47669人基本持平，历史类考生约17280人（按36%比例估算 ），竞争压力无明显变化；上海大学在青海省招生占比极低（2021–2024年约0.36%–0.40%），属跨省招生，地域偏好对位次影响 有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年历史类大幅缩招（50%）、学校声誉负面信号、社会学A级学科吸引力及本省考生规模基本持平，缩招带来的位次数字减小效应（更容易进）与 声誉负面部分抵消，预计2026年最低位次约589名，区间482–696名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年历史类仅思想政治教育一个专业招生，位次在预测区间内（482–696名）建议以该专业为主目标；位次明显优于区间下限可积极报考，位次接近区间上限需谨慎评估竞争风 险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 372 → 1123 → 642 → 653 → 799, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing, then increasing, then decreasing again; the 2025 baseline is about 799, moving back 146 places compared to 653 in 2024; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category were 3, 6, 6, 6, 6 respectively, with 6 in 2025; in 2026, the history category plans to enroll 3 students, a 50% reduction compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science 2026 main ranking approximately 60th, with recent rankings stable in the 43–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean's paper fraud, teacher data forgery, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 48th overall), short video exposure is moderately high; Sociology A, World History A-, both A- and above disciplines; there is no direct discipline mapping with the enrollment major Ideological and Political Education (Marxist Theory category), but the A-level Sociology discipline has a strong attraction for humanities and social science applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Ideological and Political Education belongs to the teacher training/education category, with 2024 major popularity showing differentiated观望, social popularity neutral and stable; the total number of candidates in this province in 2026 is about 48,000, basically unchanged from 47,669 in 2025, with history category candidates approximately 17,280 (estimated at 36% ratio), competitive pressure shows no significant change; Shanghai University's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is extremely low (about 0.36%–0.40% from 2021 to 2024), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in history category enrollment in 2026 (50%), negative reputation signals from the university, the attractiveness of the A-level Sociology discipline, and the basically stable number of candidates in this province, the ranking reduction effect (easier to enter) from the enrollment cut and the negative reputation partially offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 589, with a range of 482–696.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the history category only has one major, Ideological and Political Education, for enrollment. If your ranking is within the predicted range (482–696), it is recommended to target this major as the main goal; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can actively apply; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you need to carefully assess the competitive risk.
